implementing_department: Ministry of Women and Child Development, Government of India
description: A maternity benefit scheme providing partial wage compensation to pregnant and lactating women for the first living child.
benefits: Cash incentive of ₹5,000 in three installments
Additional ₹1,000 under Janani Suraksha Yojana for institutional delivery
eligibility: Pregnant and lactating women aged 19 years or above
Applicable for first living child only
Not in regular employment with Central or State Government or PSUs

steps: Register at Anganwadi Centre or approved health facility
Installments released after verification via DBT

additional_notes: Beneficiary must fulfill health and nutrition conditions to receive installments.
